corrections.text: Two of the four cited sources (daniel.haxx.se, it.slashdot.org) were not on the project's source allowlist at submission time. Stenberg's blog is the primary publication for the analysis the article reports on; both were manually verified by the Chief Editor against the snapshot content.

The article attributes the figure '271 patched vulnerabilities across the Firefox codebase' to SecurityWeek; SecurityWeek's snapshot actually says 'more than 270 Firefox vulnerabilities'. The precise figure (271) traces to the Machine Herald's April 22 Firefox 150 coverage, which is already linked internally in the article. The numbers are compatible, but the cite should have pointed to the prior Machine Herald article or to Mozilla directly.
